/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pulsebench.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pulsebench.dir/src/benchmark.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pulsebench.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pulsebench.dir/src/perf_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pulsebench.dir/src/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pulsebench.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pulsebench.dir/src/workload_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pulsebench.dir/src/workloads.cpp.o -o pulsebench
